title: helichrysum luteoalbum
intro: Helichrysum luteoalbum, also known as yellow or bright yellow everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of helichrysum luteoalbum are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of helichrysum luteoalbum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting liver and digestive health. Helichrysum luteoalbum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
